title: Port connection with array slice doesn't work
body:
---


Author Name: **Stefan Ludwig**
Original Redmine Issue: 711 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2014-01-23


---

Hi Wilson

There's something going wrong with arrays in ports. See test case, but essentially

    wire [7:0] port [15:0];
    wire [7:0] goodport [7:0];

    assign goodport = port[7:0];
    callee good (.port(goodport)); // works

    callee bad (.port(port[7:0])); // fails with Illegal port connection 'port', mismatch between port which is not an array, and expression which is an array.

Cheers,

Stefan
